query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM apolloCreditLog WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-06-02') as apolloRevealsToday,
  (SELECT SUM(creditsUsed) FROM apolloCreditLog WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-06-02') as totalCreditsUsed,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-06-02') as newProjectsToday,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE DATE(createdAt) = '2026-06-02') as newContactsToday,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contacts WHERE contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') as totalSendReady,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) FROM projects p JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId WHERE p.priority = 'hot' AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') as hotProjectsWithContacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE priority = 'hot' AND status = 'active') as totalHotProjects,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE priority = 'warm' AND status = 'active') as totalWarmProjects;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE priority = 'hot' AND status = 'active') as totalHotProjects,
